Speaker 1: So, um, how-how did you guys meet?
Speaker 2: Well um, I was in ah Mrs. Knight’s ah, I mean Alice, sorry, Alice, I always do that. I was in her ah, Home Ec class.
Mrs. Knight: And he was my best student.
Speaker 2: Yeah, she was my best teacher.
Mrs. Knight: Ohhh.
Speaker 4: If that doesn’t keep kids in school, what will?
Speaker 5: And so now you guys are gonna be married?
Mrs. Knight: Yeah. Y'know we-we talked about just living together, but um, we want to have kids right away.
